title: Boulder Cove
description: A cozy prehistoric island life game where you gather, fish, catch bugs, plant trees, and help dinosaur neighbors earn your own boulder hut.

prompt.objective: Build a prehistoric island life game where a cave kid earns a boulder hut.

mintAssets.brief: Cave kid, dinosaurs, stone huts, trees, tools, fish, bugs, and fruit.
Rig characters for travel, social, fishing, and net motions.
Village music, shore ambience, action cues, and chimes.
Stone-and-leaf Boulder Cove title with a spotted egg.

experience: Gather, fish, catch bugs, plant trees, and grant wishes.
Earn coins, build a hut, and explore splat interiors.
prompt.visualDirection: Pastel prehistoric toy diorama with friendly dinosaurs and clear UI.

thumbnail.alt: A cave kid explores a pastel prehistoric village with stone huts, a bone bridge, trees, tools, and a life-sim HUD.

social.title: Boulder Cove
social.description: Gather, fish, catch bugs, and help dinosaur neighbors build your boulder hut.

image.alt: A cave kid explores a pastel prehistoric village with stone huts, a bone bridge, trees, tools, and a life-sim HUD.
